positive: A majestic, stylized mountain lion silhouette leaping through a stylized sunset jungle clearing. The lion is depicted in an athletic, dynamic pose, surrounded by oversized, tropical flora (palm leaves, monstera leaves, heliconia) rendered in a simplified, graphic style. The composition is highly central, utilizing negative space and high contrast for an apparel print. Color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, and vibrant teal, with the silhouettes being solid black against a gradient background. Style: Neo-Art Deco mixed with modern tropical graphic design, inspired by linocut printing. Focus on clean lines, strong contrasts, and visible vector qualities. Ideal for a print on a dark background.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, poor composition, ugly, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, copyright
